case_title: POON, MAN VS PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SWNT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2004, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY RAUL ARRIAZA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $132.60 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $53.72 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ELSNER, NICK, MR.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-28-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-01-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NICK ELSNER FROM DPW FAILED TO APPEAR FOR SUBPOENA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY RAUL ARRIAZA HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-2004 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO THIRD PARTY RAUL ARRIAZA HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2004 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF ATTEMPTED SERVICE ON OEX, FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-09-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-22-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 3-22-04 @ 9:00 AM FOR COMM. MURRAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT POON, MAN DEFT'S ASSERTION THAT PLTF WAS W/O JURISDICTION TO GO TO BOARD OF SUPERVISORS AND THEREBY CAUSE DEFT DELAY IS UNSUPPORTED, AS THE BOARD OF SUPER- VISORS EXERCISED JURISDICTION WHEN THEY SUSPENDED THE HEARING 6 WEEKS & ORDERED PARTIES TO WORK ON RESOLUTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2003, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-09-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POON, MAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC $2,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,872.00, PLTF'S EVIDENCE ON DAMAGES OF $4700 WAS EXCESSIVE AS IT INCLUDED APPROXIMATELY 40% EXTRA FLAGS OF SIDEWALK THAN THOSE NECESSARY TO REPAIR DAMAGE CAUSED BY DEFTS. ACCORDINGLY, PLTF IS AWARDED 60% OF DAMAGE ESTIMATED AS THAT IS WHAT RELATES TO SECTIONS REQUIRING REPLACEMENT CAUSED BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY POON, MAN AS TO DEFENDANT PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PORTOLA HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT POON, MAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
